trainers.name: Amara Nakato
trainers.bio: Amara specializes in transformative weight loss programs tailored for the Kampala climate and lifestyle. Her high-energy cardio sessions blend traditional African movements with modern fitness science.

trainers.name: David Ssekandi
trainers.bio: David is Kampala's leading powerlifting coach with a decade of competitive experience. He builds structured periodized programs that break plateaus and build real functional strength.

trainers.name: Grace Apio
trainers.bio: Grace integrates Eastern mindfulness traditions with Ugandan wellness philosophy. Her yoga sessions leave clients feeling restored, aligned, and mentally clear.

trainers.name: Moses Kiggundu
trainers.bio: Moses works with Kampala's competitive athletes — from marathon runners to football players. He designs performance programs that sharpen speed, agility, and endurance.

trainers.name: Patience Nanteza
trainers.bio: Patience creates safe, empowering fitness journeys for mothers at every stage. Her compassionate approach has helped hundreds of Kampala women reclaim their strength and confidence.

trainers.name: Ronald Byaruhanga
trainers.bio: Ronald's HIIT sessions are legendary at the hub — short, brutal, effective. He uses bodyweight and functional tools to create workouts that fit busy Kampala schedules.

events.title: Kampala Dawn Run
events.description: Start your weekend with a refreshing 5K or 10K run at sunrise across Kololo Airstrip.

events.title: Outdoor HIIT Bootcamp
events.description: A high-energy group bootcamp session with resistance bands, ladders, and interval cardio.

events.title: Nutrition & Meal Prep Workshop
events.description: Learn to build balanced Ugandan meals that fuel performance. Includes cooking demo and take-home guide.

events.title: Yoga in the Garden
events.description: A restorative outdoor yoga session surrounded by nature. All levels welcome. Mats provided.

events.title: Strength Challenge Cup
events.description: Compete across deadlift, squat, and bench press categories. Prizes for top performers in each weight class.

events.title: Women's Wellness Day
events.description: A full-day experience with yoga, nutrition coaching, fitness assessments, and wellness talks.

programs.name: Beginner's Kickstart
programs.description: Designed for those just starting their fitness journey. Builds foundational strength and endurance with gentle progressions.

programs.name: Fat Burn Accelerator
programs.description: A calorie-crushing program combining HIIT, steady-state cardio, and circuit training to maximise fat loss.

programs.name: Strength Builder Pro
programs.description: A progressive overload programme focused on compound lifts to build serious, lasting strength.

programs.name: Elite Athlete Program
programs.description: Reserved for competitive athletes who demand peak output. Combines sport-specific training, recovery protocols, and performance tracking.

programs.name: Mind & Body Reset
programs.description: A holistic reset integrating yoga, breathwork, and mindful movement for stress relief and body balance.

programs.name: Post-Natal Restore
programs.description: A gentle, evidence-based programme to help new mothers rebuild core strength and restore body confidence safely.

nutrition.tip: Start your day with a protein-rich breakfast
nutrition.detail: Eating 25–30g of protein at breakfast helps control hunger hormones and supports muscle repair after morning workouts.
In Kampala's heat, dehydration sets in quickly. Aim for 3–4 litres of water daily, adding electrolytes after intense sessions.
Groundnuts, sweet potatoes, matoke, and leafy greens are affordable, nutritious, and perfectly suited to an active lifestyle.
